description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front features three wide, open horizontal shelves, ideal for storing books, electronics, or decorative items. On each side, there are two vertical cubby compartments, providing additional storage or display space. The top surface is flat and expansive, suitable for placing larger objects or serving as a workspace. The back and sides are solid panels, giving the unit a sturdy and enclosed appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A large, modern wooden shelving unit with open shelves and side cubbies, finished in a medium-brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open horizontal shelves and two vertical cubby compartments on each side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the depth of the side cubby compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a solid wood back panel with no openings or shelves visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other solid wood panel and the depth of the side cubby compartment.
